title: ForgeConfig Overload
description: ForgeConfig Overload is a mod that removes and bypasses value limits in Forge configs.
body: # ForgeConfig Overload [![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub-Repository-blue?logo=github)](https://github.com/mochi-753/ForgeConfig-Overload) [![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/CurseForge-ForgeConfig_Overload-F16436?logo=curseforge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/forgeconfig-overload) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-ForgeConfig_Overload-00AF5C?logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgeconfig-overload) --- ## ❓ What is this? **ForgeConfig Overload** is a mod that **removes and bypasses value limits in Forge configs**. Forge normally enforces minimum / maximum values for config entries (e.g. `IntValue`, `DoubleValue`, etc.). This mod **overloads that restriction layer**, allowing configs to accept values *far beyond* their original limits. In short: > **"Config limits? Shut up and let me type."** --- ## ✨ Features - 🚫 Disables min / max validation of Forge config values - 🔓 Allows extreme or otherwise impossible config settings - 🧪 Useful for experiments, testing, and chaos - 💥 Zero guarantees about stability (by design) --- ## 🚫 What this mod does NOT do - ❌ It does **not** add new configs - ❌ It does **not** magically prevent crashes - ❌ It does **not** make broken values safe If a mod was never designed to handle extreme values, **things *will* break** — that is expected. --- ## ⚠ Warning This mod intentionally breaks Forge’s safety mechanisms. - Game crashes are possible - World corruption is possible - Mods may behave unpredictably **Use at your own risk.** Back up your worlds before enabling this mod. --- ## 🤔 Use cases - Stress-testing mods - Pushing limits for fun - Debugging or experimentation - Asking “what happens if I set this to 10⁹?” --- ## 📜 License This mod is licensed under the MIT License. This mod also includes a Mixin for **Minecraft Forge** — for the original Forge license text, see `LICENSE-MinecraftForge.txt`. --- ## 💬 User responses - “分かっててやってる危険Mod” — *ChatGPT* - “ああだめだ、このMod尋常じゃない危険物だ” — *Mochi_753* (author) - “ほー、いいじゃないか。こういうのでいいんだよ、こういうので” — *バリン3g* ([バリン3gさんのYouTubeチャンネル](https://youtube.com/@valine_3g)) --- ## 📝 Afterword This is an unofficial modification. Not affiliated with or endorsed by the Minecraft Forge project. Finally, my sincere apologies to the developers of Minecraft Forge.
